items.label: Error
items.value: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for tax-exemption support.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of tax-exemption support where applicable. However, the evidence provided does not include any specific information or data points that confirm the existence or application of tax-exemption support. The only relevant evidence pertains to the currency used (USD) and does not address the requirement directly, leading to an inconclusive status.
